title: Inverse Metric Lookup — View Associated Metrics from Report or Dashboard
story: As a data analyst, I want to see which metrics are associated with a specific report or dashboard, so that I can understand the inverse of the metric-to-report relationship.
description:
Adds a middleware service that returns all associated metrics for a given report or dashboard ID. This is the inverse of the existing metric-to-report/dashboard relationship — instead of viewing reports from a metric, users can now view metrics from a report or dashboard.

The backend developer created Eloquent ORM relationships on the Report and Dashboard models to support this lookup:
- Report::find($id)->metrics()->get()
- Dashboard::find($id)->metrics()->get()

A second developer will integrate the middleware into the UI to display associated metrics on the reports and dashboards pages.
acceptance_criteria: Middleware returns all metrics associated with a given report ID
Middleware returns all metrics associated with a given dashboard ID
Multiple metrics per report/dashboard are supported
middleware_changes: Eloquent relationships added to Report and Dashboard models: metrics() returns associated metrics via the existing junction tables.
api_changes: New endpoint accepts a report or dashboard ID and returns associated metric records.
implementation_notes: Backend ORM only — UI integration handled in a separate ticket by a different developer.
comment_summary: Backend developer created ORM relationships and shared the usage pattern with the frontend developer. Product owner confirmed the division of work between backend and frontend developers.
